overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from an elevated open walkway with skyline views, through covered pedestrian plazas with food vendors, and into a large urban plaza featuring a massive digital cherry blossom display.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city skyline view

events.description: camera turns left while continuing to walk along the elevated path

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated pathway overlooking the futuristic city skyline, passing palm trees and neon signs

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle hovering in the distance above the city

entered.detail: glass and metal railing with cyan neon lighting along the edge of the walkway
tall palm tree in a planter along the walkway edge
tall street lamp with multiple bright white lights
tall skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage against the night sky
elevated curved roadway with vehicles passing below the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway at night, overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape. The camera moves forward past palm trees and glass railings with cyan neon accents, while a flying vehicle hovers in the distant sky between skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with food vendors

events.description: enters covered plaza area from open elevated walkway, passing under building overhang
passes illuminated food cart on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered plaza area, passing a brightly lit food cart and several pedestrians

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at illuminated food cart with red canopy
woman with blue hair walking toward camera

entered.detail: illuminated food cart with red canopy and bright interior lighting
multi-story building with distinctive yellow and red paneling
covered walkway bridge connecting buildings above the plaza
large blue concrete planter containing palm trees

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian plaza sheltered by building overhangs. A brightly lit food cart with a red canopy stands on the left, while the camera passes pedestrians including a woman with blue hair. The area features distinctive yellow building facades and an overhead pedestrian bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with benches and advertisements

events.description: enters darker covered corridor with purple artificial lighting replacing the mixed plaza lighting
passes pedestrians sitting on benches along the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit covered corridor, passing people sitting on benches and illuminated advertisement screens

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a concrete bench conversing

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overhead structure
backlit advertisement screen showing beverage commercial
metal safety railing with embedded cyan neon strip lighting
long concrete seating bench along the corridor wall
illuminated vending machine kiosk with product displays

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a darker, enclosed corridor with purple overhead lighting and concrete pillars. The camera moves past illuminated advertisement posters and metal railings with neon accents, while pedestrians sit on concrete benches along the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with large digital cherry blossom display

events.description: exits covered corridor into open plaza with massive digital screen visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza toward a massive building with a large digital screen displaying cherry blossoms, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking ahead toward the digital screen

entered.detail: massive building-mounted digital display showing animated pink cherry blossoms
contemporary building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
concrete seating areas with people resting
commercial entrance with bright neon signage and green lighting
tall structure with exposed industrial piping and red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a spacious urban plaza featuring a massive digital screen displaying vibrant cherry blossoms on the building ahead. The area transitions from the enclosed corridor to an open space with modern glass buildings, industrial structures with piping, and neon-lit storefronts as the camera continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated open walkway overlooking a neon cityscape into a sprawling, digitally illuminated urban plaza. It begins by gliding past palm trees and cyan-accented glass railings under a night sky where a flying vehicle hovers between skyscrapers. As the camera moves forward, the open air gives way to a covered pedestrian plaza characterized by yellow building facades, a red-canopied food cart, and passing pedestrians. The scene then shifts into a darker, enclosed corridor defined by purple overhead lighting and concrete pillars before finally opening into a spacious plaza dominated by a massive digital screen of vibrant cherry blossoms and modern glass architecture.
